description: Search, edit, delete, and manually sync channels connected to your managed site.

dialog.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The selected channels will be removed permanently.

empty.description: Add include/exclude rules with optional regex to control synced models.
empty.title: No filters yet

hints.probesAllPass: A model matches this rule only when every selected probe passes. Probes use the channel base URL and resolved channel key.
hints.regex: Regex rules support advanced matching using JavaScript syntax.
hints.substring: Plain rules match case-sensitive substrings inside model names.
hints.unsupportedChannelType: Probe rules are unavailable for this channel type because it cannot be mapped to a supported verification API.

jsonEditor.hint: The JSON must be an array of pattern or probe rule objects. Pattern rules use kind: 'pattern', name, and pattern. Probe rules use kind: 'probe', name, and probeIds. Credential fields such as apiKey, key, and baseUrl are ignored.
jsonEditor.label: Advanced JSON editor
jsonEditor.placeholder: Paste or edit an array of filter rule objects here to quickly reuse the same configuration across channels.

messages.jsonArrayRequired: JSON must be an array of filter rules.
messages.jsonItemNotObject: Filter at index {{index}} must be an object.
messages.validationName: Please provide a name for each filter.
messages.validationProbeIds: Select at least one verification probe for each probe rule.

noTargets.description: Configure another managed-site target in settings before channel migration can be used.

blockedReasons.sourceKeyMissing: The source channel key is unavailable, so this channel cannot be migrated yet.
blockedReasons.sourceKeyResolutionFailed: The source channel key could not be loaded. If you just completed verification, refresh the preview and try again.

confirm.description: This will create new target channels for {{ready}} ready channels out of {{total}} selected channels.
confirm.title: Start channel migration?
confirm.warningTitle: This flow only creates new channels. It does not sync, deduplicate, or roll back.

migration.description: Copy {{selectedCount}} channels from the current managed site into another configured managed site.

generalWarnings.createOnly: This migration only creates new channels on the target site and does not modify the source channels.
generalWarnings.noDedupeOrSync: This migration does not check for duplicates, overwrite existing target channels, or sync existing target channels.
generalWarnings.noRollback: Automatic rollback is not available in this flow. Use the result list to review any manual follow-up.
generalWarnings.title: Migration limitations

itemWarnings.dropsAdvancedSettings: Advanced provider-specific channel settings cannot be copied directly and will be dropped.
itemWarnings.dropsModelMapping: Model redirect mappings will not be copied.
itemWarnings.dropsMultiKeyState: Multi-key runtime state will not be copied.
itemWarnings.dropsStatusCodeMapping: Status-code mapping settings will not be copied.
itemWarnings.targetForcesDefaultGroup: The target site will replace the source groups with its default group.
itemWarnings.targetIgnoresPriority: The target site will not preserve the source priority value.
itemWarnings.targetIgnoresWeight: The target site will not preserve the source weight value.
itemWarnings.targetNormalizesBaseUrl: The target site will normalize the base URL before creation.
itemWarnings.targetRemapsChannelType: The target site will remap the channel type to the closest supported type.
itemWarnings.targetSimplifiesStatus: The target site will simplify the source status to enabled or disabled.

migration.title: Migrate channels

table.empty: No channels found. Try adjusting your filters.

title: Channels management

toasts.revealKeyFailed: Failed to load the real channel key: {{error}}

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, URL or group
